title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme
snippet: This news article reports on a research study published on January 7, 2026, by Professor Fabio Giglietto from the University of Urbino. The study analyzes how Meta's algorithmic choices on Facebook, Instagram, and Threads have impacted the visibility of political content, concluding that institutional political visibility has decreased while anti-European, pro-Russian, and conspiracy extremist content has gained traction.
description: This news article reports on a recent study by Professor Fabio Giglietto from the University of Urbino, analyzing how Meta's algorithms impact the visibility of political and extremist content on its platforms.

title: Panel – Meta Content Library Community Roundtable: Where to for Social Media Research?
snippet: Fabio Giglietto (Università di Urbino Carlo Bo) is listed as a panelist in this roundtable discussion, which aims to bring together leading social media researchers to discuss their experiences and frustrations with the Meta Content Library (MCL) and to foster a collaborative academic MCL user community.
description: Fabio Giglietto is listed as a panelist for a roundtable discussion on the Meta Content Library, aiming to foster collaboration among social media researchers and discuss the future of the field.
